briefdescription.para: < IP_DISABLE_0 register address and definitions
< CFU_FGCR register address and definitions
< RST_PS register address and definitions

sectiondef.header: Definition of asserts if macro is defined

briefdescription.para: < All asserts are under XSECDEBUG macro now
AES Core.
SHA Core.
RSA/ECC Core.
All Cores.
AES Core.
SHA Core.
Sources to be selected the core to check sticky bits for AES, SHA, RSA.

memberdef.name: XPlmi_Secure
memberdef.initializer: = { XPLMI_MODULE_XILSECURE_ID, XSecure_Cmds, XSECURE_API(XSECURE_API_MAX), NULL, XSecure_AccessPermBuff, NULL, }

memberdef.name: XPlmi_Secure
memberdef.initializer: = { XPLMI_MODULE_XILSECURE_ID, XSecure_Cmds, XSECURE_API(XSECURE_API_MAX), NULL, XSecure_AccessPermBuff, NULL, }

memberdef.name: XPlmi_Secure
memberdef.initializer: = { XPLMI_MODULE_XILSECURE_ID, XSecure_Cmds, XSECURE_API(XSECURE_API_MAX), NULL, XSecure_AccessPermBuff, NULL, }

briefdescription.para: This function checks if the EXPORT control eFuse is programmed and PL loading is done.

parameterdescription.para: Crypto core source (AES, SHA, RSA)

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - When crypto accelerators are enabled
XSECURE_ERR_CRYPTO_ACCELERATOR_DISABLED - When crypto accelerators are disabled
Core Source parameter is not applicable for Versal family
Validate export efuse control bit is programmed, to confirm crypto accelerator is enabled.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes AES and SHA hardware instances.

listitem.para: Initializes SHA structure for operating the SHA3 engine

briefdescription.para: This function registers the handlers for XilSecure IPI commands.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to partial PDI event parameters

briefdescription.para: This function provides the pointer to the sha3 instance.
This function provides the pointer to the sha2 instance.
This function provides the pointer to the common Aes instance which has to be used between PLM and xilsecure server.
This function provides the pointer to the common Rsa instance which has to be used between PLM and xilsecure server.
This function provides the pointer to the sha instance based on the DevieId.
The function frees AES/SHA resource.

parameterdescription.para: is the resource which is to be freed

listitem.para: Free resource by clearing its IPI mask

briefdescription.para: The function handles the SHA/AES IPI events.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to received IPI command
is the resource whose IPI events are to be handled

listitem.para: XST_INVALID_PARAM - If Cmd is NULL or Core is invalid
XST_DEVICE_BUSY - If device is busy with different IPI mask
XST_DATA_LOST - If data context was lost
Notify IPI event if the operation is in progress and if IPI mask gets mismatched and the received command is 1st Pkt
Check received command in case of IPI mask mismatch

briefdescription.para: This function sets the status of data context of previous AES/SHA operation.

parameterdescription.para: is the SHA/AES source whose data context status has to be set

listitem.para: Set data context lost only when resource is busy

briefdescription.para: This function sets the DMA source of type XSecure_SssSrc based on the provided DMA device ID.

parameterdescription.para: Device ID of DMA
DMA source is updated into the pointer

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If DMA ID is correct

memberdef.argsstring: (const XSecure_Sss *InstancePtr, XSecure_SssSrc Resource, XSecure_SssSrc InputSrc, XSecure_SssSrc OutputSrc)
memberdef.name: XSecure_SssCfg

briefdescription.para: This function configures the secure stream switch.

parameterdescription.para: Instance pointer to the XSecure_Sss
Resource for which input and output paths to be configured
Input source to be selected for the resource
Output source to be selected for the resource

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On successful configuration of the switch
XST_FAILURE - On unsuccessful configuration of the switch

simplesect.para: Resource, InputSrc, OutputSrc are of type XSecure_SssSrc

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the secure stream switch instance.

parameterdescription.para: Instance pointer to the XSecure_Sss
Instance pointer to the XSecure_Sss.

briefdescription.para: This function configures the secure stream switch for AES engine.

parameterdescription.para: Instance pointer to the XSecure_Sss
Input DMA to be selected for AES engine
Output DMA to be selected for AES engine

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On successful configuration of the switch
XST_FAILURE - On failure to configure switch

simplesect.para: InputSrc, OutputSrc are of type XSecure_SssSrc

briefdescription.para: This function configures the secure stream switch for SHA hardware engine.

parameterdescription.para: Instance pointer to the XSecure_Sss
Device ID of DMA which is to be used as an input to the SHA engine
SHA resource for which input and output paths to be configured

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On successful configuration of the switch
XST_FAILURE - On failure to configure switch

briefdescription.para: This function configures secure stream switch to set DMA in loop back mode.

parameterdescription.para: Instance pointer to the XSecure_Sss
Device ID of DMA

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On successful configuration of the switch
XST_FAILURE - On failure to configure switch

briefdescription.para: This function takes the hardware core out of reset.

parameterdescription.para: Base address of the core
Offset of the reset register

listitem.para: Set bit when crypto is in use

briefdescription.para: This function places the hardware core into the reset.

parameterdescription.para: Base address of the core
Offset of the reset register

listitem.para: Clear bit when crypto is not in use

briefdescription.para: Read from the register.

parameterdescription.para: Contains the base address of the device
Contains the offset from the base address of the device

listitem.para: The value read from the register

briefdescription.para: Write to the register.

parameterdescription.para: Contains the base address of the device
Contains the offset from the base address of the device
Is the value to be written to the register

briefdescription.para: This function reads data from 64-bit address.

parameterdescription.para: is the address

listitem.para: The value read from the provided address

briefdescription.para: This function reads a byte from 64-bit address.

parameterdescription.para: is the address

listitem.para: The value read from the provided address

briefdescription.para: This function writes data to 64-bit address.

parameterdescription.para: is the address
is the value to be written

briefdescription.para: This function writes 32 bit data to 64-bit address.

parameterdescription.para: is the address
is the value to be written

briefdescription.para: This function writes a byte to a 64-bit address.

parameterdescription.para: is the address
is the value to be written

briefdescription.para: This function calls the handler for invalid commands.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to IPI payload data
Buffer to store response of slaves

listitem.para: XPLMI_SSIT_INTR_NOT_ENABLED If interrupts are not enabled.

briefdescription.para: This function checks if a particular Secure API ID is supported or not.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the command structure

briefdescription.para: This function processes XilSecure IPI commands.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_INVALID_PARAM If any input parameter is invalid
Call the respective API handler according to API ID

briefdescription.para: This function registers the XilSecure commands to the PLMI.
This function checks if a particular Secure API ID is supported or not.

parameterdescription.para: is API ID in the IPI request.

listitem.para: Verify if the provided API ID is supported based on export control bit or not

briefdescription.para: Set value of data context lost.
Clear value of data context lost.
IPI First packet Mask.
To set the core into reset.
To take the core out of reset.
WORD size in BYTES.
QWORD size in BYTES.
WORD size in BITS.
Byte size in BITS.
WORD alignment.
To set bit.
To clear bit.
Integer value 1U.
Integer value 2U.
Integer value 3U.
To assign invalid value.
To assign/compare to zero.
Backward compatibility.
Backward compatibility.
Reads data from 32-bit address.
Writes data to 32-bit address.
Writes data to 32-bit address and checks for blind writes.
